numeric_schemas.name: tenure_months
numeric_schemas.description: Months since the customer first subscribed.

numeric_schemas.name: num_products
numeric_schemas.description: Number of active products or add-ons.

numeric_schemas.name: support_calls_last_6m
numeric_schemas.description: Support tickets raised in the past 6 months.

categorical_schemas.name: payment_method
categorical_schemas.description: How the customer pays each month.

binary_schemas.name: has_internet
binary_schemas.description: Customer has an internet service plan.

model_card.name: Churn Prediction Model
model_card.description: Binary classifier that estimates the probability a customer will cancel their subscription within the next billing cycle.
model_card.intended_use: Identify at-risk customers so the retention team can send targeted offers. Use find_threshold() to pick the operating point that matches your business constraint (e.g. recall >= 0.8 before maximising precision).
model_card.limitations: Trained on synthetic data. Validate against real customer cohorts before production use and retrain whenever drift is detected on any feature.
